name: balanz-login-autofill
description: Enables standard password manager autofill on the Balanz login page.

scripts.lint:firefox: npm run build:firefox && web-ext lint --source-dir dist/firefox --self-hosted
scripts.package:chrome: npm run build:chrome && web-ext build --source-dir dist/chrome --artifacts-dir artifacts --filename balanz-login-autofill-chrome.zip --overwrite-dest
scripts.package:firefox: npm run build:firefox && web-ext build --source-dir dist/firefox --artifacts-dir artifacts --filename balanz-login-autofill-firefox.zip --overwrite-dest
